narrative: Cream availability was lighter in parts of the Central region; the published range describes first sales F.O.B. and is not a retail shelf price.
title: Butter - Central U.S.

narrative: Regional shell-egg inventories are wholesale inventory context, not consumer availability.
title: National Weekly Shell Egg Inventory

narrative: Long- and medium-grain milled rice, second heads, brewers, and byproducts were reported steady in the South and California.
title: National Weekly Rice Summary

narrative: Volumes and first-handler F.O.B. prices describe shipping-point markets, not retail shelf conditions.
title: National Shipping Point Trends Report
